ddls:
CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the post */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body content of the post */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the post was created */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the post */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the post belongs to */,
  "post_views" INTEGER /* Number of views the post has received */,
  "num_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes the post has received */,
  "post_status" INTEGER /* Status of the post (e.g., active, pending review, closed) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* A comma-separated list of tags to categorize posts more granularly */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* The date and time of the last activity (e.g., comment, edit) on the post */,
  "num_comments" INTEGER /* The number of comments on the post */,
  "is_pinned" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the post is pinned to the top of the category */,
  "is_locked" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the post is locked (no further comments allowed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_post_status FOREIGN KEY ("post_status") REFERENCES post_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, member) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended, banned) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* User's birthdate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* User's gender */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the user */,
  "reputation_score" INTEGER /* User's reputation score based on community interactions */,
  "num_posts" INTEGER /* Number of posts created by the user */,
  "num_comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments made by the user */,
  "num_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes given by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category, if applicable (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  "slug" TEXT /* URL-friendly version of the category name */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the category is archived and no longer active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the category */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being voted on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who cast the vote */,
  "vote_value" INTEGER /* Value of the vote (e.g., 1 for upvote, -1 for downvote) */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the vote was cast */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the vote was last updated (in case of revoking or changing a vote) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_votes_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_votes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed the post */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the post was viewed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who viewed the post */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used to view the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_views_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the post status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the post status */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the status is the default status for new posts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderators" (
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderator */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a moderator */,
  "moderator_since" TEXT /* Date and time when the user became a moderator */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the moderator (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "num_actions" INTEGER /* Number of moderation actions taken by the moderator */,
  "last_action_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last moderation action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("moderator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderation log entry */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being moderated */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who took the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., approve, reject, edit) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the action was taken */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the moderation action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of moderation action (e.g., approve, reject, edit, delete) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the moderation action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_logs_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_logs_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES moderators ("moderator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string of permissions associated with the role */,
  "is_custom" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the role is custom or predefined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the user's website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON object of the user's social media links */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the profile was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the profile was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
